parameters.content:
## 📋 STEP 1: ORDER FORM
Customer fills online form:
- Name & Email
- Phone Number
- Order Items
- Delivery Address
- Payment Method

## 💾 STEP 2: AUTO SAVE
- Order saved to Google Sheets
- Timestamp added automatically
- Status set to **Pending**
- Full order history maintained

# 🍕 MILLER'S PIZZA — ORDER AUTOMATION
**Built by M Ahsaan Ullah**
fiverr.com/ahsaanullah001

---
📋 Order Form → 💾 Auto Save
→ 📧 Customer Email → 🔔 Kitchen Alert
→ ✅ Status Update

**Saves 2-3 hours daily | Zero manual work**

## 📧 STEP 3: CUSTOMER CONFIRMATION
- Instant email to customer
- Order details included
- 30-45 min delivery time
- **Professional branded email**

## 🔔 STEP 4: KITCHEN ALERT
- Instant notification to team
- Full order details included
- Customer contact info
- **Start preparing immediately**

## ✅ STEP 5: STATUS UPDATE
- Order marked **"Processing"**
- Automatic audit trail
- Zero manual tracking needed
- **100% automated** ⚡

# 💾 STEP 7: UPDATE PREPARED
**Matches order by:** Customer Email

Updates in sheet:
- Status → **Prepared**
- Kitchen Staff → Staff name
- Prepared Time → Auto timestamp

**Zero manual entry required**

# 🛵 STEP 9: DELIVERY ALERT
**Instant email to delivery team**

Contains:
- Customer email
- Prepared by (staff name)
- Status confirmation

⚡ **Triggered automatically**
when kitchen marks prepared

# STEP 6 🍽️ KITCHEN DASHBOARD
## Staff Order Management

**Trigger:** Kitchen staff submits form
**URL:** Separate from customer form
**Access:** Kitchen team only

Fields required:
- Customer Email (to match order)
- Kitchen Staff Name
- Status: Prepared ✅

# ⏰ STEP 11: SMART WAIT
**Waits 15 minutes after delivery**

Why?
- Give customer time to receive order
- Then ask for feedback at right moment
- **Not too early, not too late**

Fully automated timing ✅

## ⭐ STEP 12: FEEDBACK EMAIL
Auto sent after 10 min wait

Contains:
- Personalized message
- Direct feedback form link
- Thank you note

**Builds customer loyalty** 🍕

## ✅ STEPS 13 & 14: FINAL UPDATES

**Mark Delivered:**
- Status → Delivered
- Delivered Time → Auto timestamp
- Feedback Sent → Yes

**Save Feedback:**
- Rating saved to sheet
- Comments saved to sheet
- **Complete order audit trail** 📊

# 🍽️ KITCHEN & DELIVERY WORKFLOW
**Staff Portal — Miller's Pizza**

---
🍽️ Kitchen Form → 💾 Update Status
→ 📊 Get Order → 🛵 Delivery Alert
→ 🛵 Rider Form → ⏰ Wait 10min
→ ⭐ Feedback Email → ✅ Mark Delivered
→ 📝 Save Feedback

**Full lifecycle — Zero manual work**
Built by M Ahsaan Ullah
fiverr.com/ahsaanullah001

parameters.content:
## 🛵 STEP 10: RIDER FORM
Rider confirms delivery completion

Fields:
- Customer Email
- Rider Name
- Delivery Status: Delivered

**Triggers feedback flow automatically**

### 📊 STEP 8: GET ORDER DATA
Fetches complete order from sheet

- Matches by Customer Email
- Gets Name, Phone, Address
- Gets Order & Payment details
- **Returns full customer record**

## ⭐ STEP 15: FEEDBACK FORM
Customer rates their experience

Fields:
- Email
- Rating (1-5 ⭐)
- Comments

**Data saved directly to sheet**
Zero manual collection needed
